name: vulnerable-bank-backend
description: Intentionally vulnerable backend for OWASP learning

_comments.express: Web framework for building REST APIs and handling HTTP requests.
_comments.mongoose: MongoDB ODM used to define schemas and interact with MongoDB.
_comments.redis: In-memory data store used for caching, sessions, and rate limiting.
_comments.bcryptjs: Hashes passwords securely before storing them in the database.
_comments.jsonwebtoken: Creates and verifies JWT access tokens for authentication.
_comments.speakeasy: Generates and verifies TOTP codes for Two-Factor Authentication (2FA).
_comments.qrcode: Generates QR codes for authenticator apps during 2FA setup.
_comments.helmet: Adds security-related HTTP headers to protect the API.
_comments.cors: Allows controlled cross-origin requests from frontend applications.
_comments.express-rate-limit: Prevents abuse by limiting requests per IP.
_comments.rate-limit-redis: Stores rate-limit data in Redis for distributed environments.
_comments.xss-clean: Sanitizes user input to reduce XSS attack risks.
_comments.hpp: Protects against HTTP Parameter Pollution attacks.
_comments.joi: Validates request payloads and user input.
_comments.nodemailer: Sends emails such as OTPs, alerts, and notifications.
_comments.crypto: Provides cryptographic utilities like token generation and hashing.
_comments.nodemon: Automatically restarts the server during development.
_comments.supertest: Tests API endpoints by making HTTP requests.
_comments.eslint: Maintains code quality and enforces coding standards.
